description: PRD-driven Ralph loop for collaboration/study IA cleanup, staged intake workflow, and test hardening.
project: TGX Portal UX Reorientation And Intake Workflow Refactor

TASK-001.acceptance: Sidebar exposes `Collaborations` and `Studies` as the main browse model, supports preview/collapse behavior, and no longer depends on duplicated registry/directory links.
TASK-001.description: Reshape the sidebar so `Collaborations` and `Studies` are the primary browse entries, preserve `Reference library` and `Admin`, and remove duplicated registry/directory navigation patterns.
TASK-001.notes: Read AGENTS.md and docs/03-UI_UX_REQUIREMENTS.md first. Frontend work must use shadcn/ui patterns and update relevant Vitest coverage.
TASK-001.prd_section: Story 1: Browse collaborations from one obvious home; Story 2: Browse studies in a way that preserves collaboration context; REQ-001; REQ-002
TASK-001.title: Refactor sidebar IA around collaborations and studies

TASK-002.acceptance: A collaboration index page exists, uses server-side table patterns, and provides a clear create action and click-through path.
TASK-002.description: Create or refactor the collaboration browse page so it becomes the single main entry for collaboration discovery, search, pagination, and creation.
TASK-002.notes: Use shadcn/ui table-adjacent primitives. Follow TanStack Query + TanStack Table server-side patterns.
TASK-002.prd_section: Story 1: Browse collaborations from one obvious home; REQ-003; REQ-011
TASK-002.title: Add collaboration index page and server-side table flow

TASK-003.acceptance: Study title is the primary label in navigation and lists, species/cell line are secondary, and the study index is grouped or context-rich by collaboration.
TASK-003.description: Introduce an explicit study title/name into the user flow and adjust the study browse page so studies are grouped by collaboration with title-first labeling.
TASK-003.notes: Read docs/01-DATABASE_SCHEMA.md, docs/02-API_AND_INTEGRATIONS.md, and docs/03-UI_UX_REQUIREMENTS.md. Apply TDD if schema or API changes are needed.
TASK-003.prd_section: Story 2: Browse studies in a way that preserves collaboration context; REQ-004; D2
TASK-003.title: Add explicit study title support and study index grouping

TASK-004.acceptance: Opening a study lands on a samples-first workspace with the required tabs and predictable submenu actions.
TASK-004.description: Refocus the study workspace around a samples-first layout with tabs for contrasts and collaboration information, plus a study-specific submenu in the sidebar.
TASK-004.notes: Preserve shadcn/ui tabs and table patterns. Convert secondary hints into tooltips or progressive disclosure where appropriate.
TASK-004.prd_section: Story 3: Open a study into a focused workspace; REQ-005
TASK-004.title: Restructure study workspace into samples, contrasts, and collaboration info

TASK-005.acceptance: Global study create requires collaboration selection first, and both create flows redirect into the new route model with clear success messaging.
TASK-005.description: Keep the global `New study` entry but require collaboration selection as step 1, then redirect collaboration and study creation into the next meaningful workspace step.
TASK-005.notes: Update routing tests and mutation success flows. Respect permissions and preserve context from collaboration-scoped entry points.
TASK-005.prd_section: Story 4: Create collaboration and study records with forward momentum; REQ-006; D1
TASK-005.title: Make create flows collaboration-aware and redirect-forward

TASK-006.acceptance: A multi-step wizard exists with clear stage progression, shadcn/ui composition, and route-safe state handling.
TASK-006.description: Implement the staged onboarding flow shell and route/state persistence for high-level details, template selection, upload/validation, mappings, and review.
TASK-006.notes: Use shadcn/ui composition, keep styling close to defaults, and test the shell before deeper workflow logic.
TASK-006.prd_section: Story 5: Complete metadata onboarding through a staged wizard; REQ-007
TASK-006.title: Build onboarding wizard shell from the PRD stages

TASK-007.acceptance: Template setup supports required and optional fields, bounded custom metadata definitions, and the hybrid lookup policy for inline value creation.
TASK-007.description: Add the template setup step and the lookup contract needed for required/optional fields, admin-managed metadata definitions, and hybrid create-or-select rules.
TASK-007.notes: Controlled vocabularies remain admin-managed. Softer recurring values can use scoped select-or-create patterns.
TASK-007.prd_section: Story 5: Complete metadata onboarding through a staged wizard; Story 6: Reuse controlled values without losing flexibility; REQ-008; REQ-013; D3
TASK-007.title: Implement lookup-driven template setup and bounded create-or-select behavior

TASK-008.acceptance: Users can upload CSV/TSV metadata, preview it, and receive user-readable row/cell validation feedback with aggregated errors.
TASK-008.description: Build the drag-and-drop upload step with local preview plus backend aggregate validation that returns all discovered issues in one pass.
TASK-008.notes: Read docs/02-API_AND_INTEGRATIONS.md and docs/03-UI_UX_REQUIREMENTS.md. Use Pydantic-driven validation and user-readable error mapping.
TASK-008.prd_section: Story 5: Complete metadata onboarding through a staged wizard; REQ-009
TASK-008.title: Implement metadata upload preview and aggregate validation

TASK-009.acceptance: Mapping options come from uploaded metadata, draft save works before final validity, suggested contrasts are reviewable, and final generation remains validation-gated.
TASK-009.description: Support multiple treatment and batch mappings derived from metadata, allow draft save, suggest candidate contrasts, and block final output generation until mappings are valid.
TASK-009.notes: Read docs/04-PIPELINE_CONFIG_MAPPING.md. Be explicit about draft versus final-ready states in both UI and backend logic.
TASK-009.prd_section: Story 5: Complete metadata onboarding through a staged wizard; REQ-010; D4
TASK-009.title: Implement mapping, contrast suggestion, and draft/final gating

TASK-010.acceptance: Two collaborations with three studies each can be seeded through a documented reset flow, and the main UX journeys are covered by container-first tests.
TASK-010.description: Create the seeded validation environment described in the PRD and strengthen backend, frontend, and E2E tests around the new navigation and onboarding flow.
TASK-010.notes: Follow AGENTS.md Docker-first rules and docs/05-DEVOPS_AND_TESTING.md. Prefer reproducible factories and deterministic seeds.
TASK-010.prd_section: Story 7: Validate and test against realistic seeded data; REQ-012
TASK-010.title: Add deterministic seed data, reset flow, and end-to-end test hardening
